title: Hungry for Mushrooms
description:
[sine]How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?[/sine]

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of [green]tasty mushrooms[/green] being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)

options.title: Fragrant Mushroom
options.description: Lose [red]15[/red] HP. Obtain the [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold] relic.

notes: The localization data contains an unused [gold]Medley[/gold] page — its description depicts a third mushroom option where a "presumably dead" adventurer attacks when you take their food, suggesting a third choice may have been planned but not yet implemented.
